zh.lifeSummary: 當Hélissende de Vergy於1267年出生在法國諾門迪奧內費爾受鞭刑案時，她的父親Jean de Vergy I20歲，母親marguerite DE NOYERS,17歲。她於1300年與Gaucher V de Châtillon結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1312年享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hélissende de Vergy于1267年出生在法国諾門迪奧內費爾受鞭刑案时，她的父亲Jean de Vergy I20岁，母亲marguerite DE NOYERS,17岁。她于1300年与Gaucher V de Châtillon结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1312年享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vergy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English verge ‘rod, pole, or perch (unit of length or area); half-acre’ (Old French verge), perhaps denoting the owner of that amount of land.
English: variant of Ferridge, a habitational name from Verridge Wood in Frant (Sussex). The placename probably derives from Old English fearn ‘fern, bracken’ + hrycg ‘ridge’.
Catalan (Vergé): variant of Verger, a topographic name from Catalan verger ‘orchard’ (from Latin viridiarium).

variants.name: Thivierge
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Henri, Hermel, Lucien, Herve, Renald, Rosaire.
French: variant of Thibierge (and, in North America, an altered form of this), which is of the same origin as Théberge (see Theberge ). The surname Thivierge is very rare in France. Compare Verge .

History: Hippolyte Thibierge from Blois in Loir-et-Cher, France, married Renée Hervet in Blois in 1653, died in Sainte-Famille, Île d'Orléans, QC, in 1700. His descendants also bear another altered form of the surname, Verge.

variants.name: Verges
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Raul, Carmelita, Gilberto, Jorge, Jose, Juanita, Lourdes, Nieves, Rafael, Ricardo, Vidal.  French Emile.

French (Occitan; Vergès) and Catalan (Vergés): from the plural of Occitan verg(i)èr and Catalan verger ‘orchard’, a topographic name for someone who lived near an orchard or garden, or an occupational name for someone who was employed in one (see Verge 3 and Verdier 2).

en.lifeSummary: When Hélissende de Vergy was born in 1267, in Fay, Orne, Normandy, France, her father, Jean de Vergy I, was 20 and her mother, marguerite DE NOYERS,, was 17. She married Gaucher V de Châtillon in 1300. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1312, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hélissende de Vergy est née en 1267, à Fay, Orne, Normandie, France, son père, Jean de Vergy I, avait 20 ans et sa mère, marguerite DE NOYERS,, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Gaucher V de Châtillon en 1300. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1312, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hélissende de Vergy 1267 in Fay, Orne, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jean de Vergy I 20 und ihre Mutter marguerite DE NOYERS, 17. Sie hat 1300 Gaucher V de Châtillon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1312 im Alter von 45 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hélissende de Vergy è nata il nel 1267 nel Fay, Orne, Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Jean de Vergy I, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, marguerite DE NOYERS,, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Gaucher V de Châtillon nel 1300. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1312, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hélissende de Vergyが1267年にフランスノーマンディオルンファイで生まれた時，父Jean de Vergy Iは20歳，母marguerite DE NOYERS,は17歳であった。1300年にGaucher V de Châtillonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1312年に45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hélissende de Vergy(이)가 1267년 프랑스 노먼디 른 파이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jean de Vergy I(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 marguerite DE NOYERS,(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1300년 Gaucher V de Châtillon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1312년 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hélissende de Vergy nasceu em 1267, em Fay, Orne, Normandie, França, seu pai, Jean de Vergy I, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, marguerite DE NOYERS,, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Gaucher V de Châtillon em 1300. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1312, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hélissende de Vergy родилась в 1267 г. в местности феи, орн, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Jean de Vergy I было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали marguerite DE NOYERS,, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gaucher V de Châtillon в 1300 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1312 г. в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hélissende de Vergy nació en 1267, en Fay, Orne, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Jean de Vergy I, tenía 20 años y su mamá, marguerite DE NOYERS,, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Gaucher V de Châtillon en 1300. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1312, a la edad de 45 años.
